title: thesium brachystylum
intro: Thesium brachystylum, also known as the alpine thyme, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve sleep quality. Thesium brachystylum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
